name: mrt-listing-quality-auditor
description: Audit MyRealTrip tour and activity listing pages with public evidence and produce operator QA reports.

interface.shortDescription: Audits tour listing pages before publishing.
interface.longDescription: Uses public evidence to audit MyRealTrip tour and activity listings, find missing or unclear booking information, and produce operator QA reports with partner follow-up questions.
defaultPrompt: Find missing listing details before publish.
